questionText: Você quer pedir a um amigo que desligue as luzes ao sair do quarto para economizar energia. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: Please turn off the lights when you leave the room.
options: Please turn off the lights when you leave the room.
You should open the windows when you leave.
Don't forget to turn on the lights before you go.
Make sure you charge your phone before leaving.

questionText: Você quer informar alguém que a reciclagem ajuda o meio ambiente. Como você expressa isso?
correctAnswer: Recycling helps protect the environment.
options: Recycling helps protect the environment.
Throwing away trash is good for nature.
Burning waste reduces pollution.
Recycling makes the environment more dangerous.

questionText: Você quer sugerir a um colega que use transporte público em vez de carro para reduzir a poluição. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: You should take public transport instead of driving to reduce pollution.
options: You should take public transport instead of driving to reduce pollution.
You ought to drive faster to save time and fuel.
Try to use your car every day to help the environment.
Public transport is bad for the air quality in cities.

questionText: Você quer dizer que é importante economizar água no dia a dia. Como você expressa isso em inglês?
correctAnswer: It is important to save water every day.
options: It is important to save water every day.
It is necessary to waste water regularly.
We must use as much water as possible.
Water conservation is not a priority.

questionText: Você quer perguntar se alguém separa o lixo para reciclar. Como você faz essa pergunta?
correctAnswer: Do you sort your rubbish for recycling?
options: Do you sort your rubbish for recycling?
Do you throw everything in the same bin?
Have you ever burned your waste at home?
Do you buy new products instead of recycling?

questionText: Você quer avisar que jogar lixo no chão é prejudicial ao meio ambiente. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: Littering is harmful to the environment.
options: Littering is harmful to the environment.
Dropping litter is a good habit for the planet.
Throwing trash on the ground cleans the streets.
Littering helps keep cities tidy.

questionText: Você quer dizer que plantar árvores é uma boa forma de ajudar o meio ambiente. Como você expressa isso?
correctAnswer: Planting trees is a great way to help the environment.
options: Planting trees is a great way to help the environment.
Cutting down trees improves the quality of air.
Removing forests is good for local wildlife.
Planting trees increases pollution in cities.

questionText: Você quer dizer que usar sacolas reutilizáveis reduz o desperdício de plástico. Como você diz isso?
correctAnswer: Using reusable bags reduces plastic waste.
options: Using reusable bags reduces plastic waste.
Plastic bags are the best option for shopping.
Buying more plastic bags helps the environment.
Reusable bags create more waste than plastic ones.

questionText: Você quer perguntar a um colega o que ele faz para economizar energia em casa. Como você pergunta?
correctAnswer: What do you do to save energy at home?
options: What do you do to save energy at home?
How much electricity do you waste every month?
Do you always leave your appliances on?
Why do you use so much power at home?

questionText: Você quer expressar preocupação com o aumento do desmatamento. Como você faz isso de forma simples?
correctAnswer: I am worried about the increase in deforestation.
options: I am worried about the increase in deforestation.
I am happy that more forests are being cut down.
Deforestation is a positive trend for the economy.
I don't mind if more trees are removed.

questionText: Você quer informar alguém que as energias renováveis são melhores para o planeta do que os combustíveis fósseis. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: Renewable energy is better for the planet than fossil fuels.
options: Renewable energy is better for the planet than fossil fuels.
Fossil fuels are cleaner than renewable energy sources.
Oil and gas are the most eco-friendly options available.
Renewable energy causes more pollution than coal.

questionText: Você quer concordar com alguém que disse que devemos proteger os oceanos. Como você expressa concordância?
correctAnswer: I totally agree. We need to protect our oceans.
options: I totally agree. We need to protect our oceans.
I disagree. Oceans can take care of themselves.
That's wrong. Pollution doesn't affect the sea.
I'm not sure oceans need any protection at all.

questionText: Você quer pedir a alguém que não desperdice alimentos, pois isso também tem impacto ambiental. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: Please try not to waste food. It also has an environmental impact.
options: Please try not to waste food. It also has an environmental impact.
Feel free to throw away as much food as you like.
Wasting food is completely harmless to the environment.
It's okay to leave lots of food on your plate every day.

questionText: Você quer dizer que o aquecimento global é um problema sério que afeta todo o planeta. Como você expressa isso?
correctAnswer: Global warming is a serious problem that affects the whole planet.
options: Global warming is a serious problem that affects the whole planet.
Global warming only affects cold countries in the north.
Climate change is a minor issue that will go away soon.
Warming temperatures are always good for the environment.

questionText: Você quer sugerir que as pessoas andem de bicicleta para trabalhar para reduzir as emissões de carbono. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: Why don't people cycle to work to reduce carbon emissions?
options: Why don't people cycle to work to reduce carbon emissions?
People should drive more cars to lower carbon emissions.
Taking a plane to work is the best way to reduce pollution.
Using more fuel helps in reducing carbon in the atmosphere.

questionText: Você quer dizer que compramos produtos com muita embalagem plástica desnecessária. Como você expressa isso de forma simples?
correctAnswer: We buy products with too much unnecessary plastic packaging.
options: We buy products with too much unnecessary plastic packaging.
All plastic packaging is essential and good for the planet.
We should encourage companies to use more plastic in products.
Plastic packaging has no negative effects on the environment.

questionText: Você quer dizer a um amigo que deixou a torneira aberta para fechar para economizar água. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: Could you please turn off the tap? We need to save water.
options: Could you please turn off the tap? We need to save water.
Please leave the tap running. It doesn't matter.
Keep the water on. There's no need to worry about it.
Open the tap more so the water flows faster.

questionText: Você está em uma reunião e quer propor que a empresa adote uma política de impressão reduzida para diminuir o uso de papel. Como você faz essa sugestão de forma adequada?
correctAnswer: I'd like to suggest that we implement a reduced printing policy to cut down on paper use.
options: I'd like to suggest that we implement a reduced printing policy to cut down on paper use.
I think we should print more documents to improve our workflow.
We need to buy more printers to handle the company's paper needs.
Perhaps we could encourage staff to use more paper for their tasks.

questionText: Você quer explicar para turistas estrangeiros por que é importante não deixar lixo em áreas naturais. Como você expressa isso?
correctAnswer: Leaving rubbish in natural areas damages local ecosystems and harms wildlife.
options: Leaving rubbish in natural areas damages local ecosystems and harms wildlife.
Dropping litter in forests helps fertilise the soil naturally.
Natural areas are designed to absorb any amount of waste.
Wildlife benefits from the food scraps visitors leave behind.

questionText: Alguém pergunta o que você pensa sobre o uso de energia solar em residências. Como você expressa sua opinião de forma equilibrada?
correctAnswer: In my opinion, solar energy is a viable option for households, although the initial cost can be high.
options: In my opinion, solar energy is a viable option for households, although the initial cost can be high.
I believe solar panels are useless because they only work on sunny days.
As far as I'm concerned, solar energy is too expensive and should be avoided.
I think solar power is harmful because it produces a lot of carbon dioxide.

questionText: Você quer explicar a diferença entre biodegradável e não-biodegradável para um grupo de estudantes. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: Biodegradable materials break down naturally, whereas non-biodegradable ones remain in the environment for a long time.
options: Biodegradable materials break down naturally, whereas non-biodegradable ones remain in the environment for a long time.
Both biodegradable and non-biodegradable materials decompose at the same speed.
Non-biodegradable materials are safer for the environment than biodegradable ones.
Biodegradable products always last longer than synthetic materials in nature.

questionText: Você quer discordar educadamente de um colega que afirmou que a poluição não afeta a saúde humana. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: I see your point, but I think air pollution can seriously affect people's health.
options: I see your point, but I think air pollution can seriously affect people's health.
You're absolutely right. Pollution has no impact on human health.
I agree completely. Clean air is not necessary for good health.
That's a great point. Pollution actually makes people healthier.

questionText: Você quer perguntar a alguém que tipo de medidas ele toma em casa para viver de forma mais sustentável. Como você pergunta?
correctAnswer: What measures do you take at home to live more sustainably?
options: What measures do you take at home to live more sustainably?
How many appliances do you leave on standby every night?
Do you always buy new products instead of reusing old ones?
Why do you consume so much energy and water at home?

questionText: Você quer relatar que sua cidade tem sofrido com a falta de chuva nos últimos meses e que isso está afetando o abastecimento de água. Como você descreve a situação?
correctAnswer: Our city has been experiencing a drought for the past few months, which has been affecting the water supply.
options: Our city has been experiencing a drought for the past few months, which has been affecting the water supply.
It has been raining heavily lately, so there is no problem with the water supply.
Our city has too much water and needs to find ways to use it all.
The water supply has improved greatly because of recent environmental policies.

questionText: Você quer convencer seu irmão a comprar produtos locais em vez de importados para reduzir a pegada de carbono. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: If you buy local products, you help reduce the carbon footprint caused by long-distance transportation.
options: If you buy local products, you help reduce the carbon footprint caused by long-distance transportation.
Importing goods from abroad is the most environmentally friendly option.
Local products always have a larger carbon footprint than imported ones.
Buying products from other countries supports sustainable development.

questionText: Em uma apresentação escolar, você precisa introduzir o tema das mudanças climáticas. Como você começa sua fala?
correctAnswer: Today, I'd like to talk about climate change and its impact on our planet.
options: Today, I'd like to talk about climate change and its impact on our planet.
Today, I'm going to explain why climate change is not a real problem.
My presentation is about why we should ignore environmental issues.
I want to show you that climate change has no scientific basis.

questionText: Você quer expressar que está comprometido a reduzir seu consumo de plástico. Como você diz isso de forma natural?
correctAnswer: I've decided to cut down on my plastic consumption as much as possible.
options: I've decided to cut down on my plastic consumption as much as possible.
I plan to increase my use of single-use plastic products every day.
I am committed to buying more plastic packaging whenever I can.
I want to start using more disposable items to reduce my waste.

questionText: Você quer perguntar a um especialista quais são os principais fatores que contribuem para a perda de biodiversidade. Como você faz essa pergunta?
correctAnswer: Could you explain what the main factors contributing to biodiversity loss are?
options: Could you explain what the main factors contributing to biodiversity loss are?
Can you tell me why biodiversity is increasing so rapidly worldwide?
Would you mind explaining why animals and plants are flourishing globally?
Do you know how pollution helps increase the number of animal species?

questionText: Você quer expressar que, embora os carros elétricos sejam mais caros, eles poluem menos. Como você constrói essa frase de contraste?
correctAnswer: Even though electric cars are more expensive, they produce far less pollution than petrol vehicles.
options: Even though electric cars are more expensive, they produce far less pollution than petrol vehicles.
Because electric cars are cheaper, they are worse for the environment than petrol cars.
Since petrol cars are more affordable, they are the best option for reducing emissions.
Although electric cars are cleaner, they cost exactly the same as conventional vehicles.

questionText: Você quer encorajar um grupo de voluntários antes de uma ação de limpeza ambiental. O que você diz para motivá-los?
correctAnswer: Every small action we take today makes a real difference for the future of our planet.
options: Every small action we take today makes a real difference for the future of our planet.
It doesn't matter what we do today since the environment will recover on its own.
Let's not waste our time here. Cleaning up won't change anything at all.
Individual efforts are pointless unless governments take action first.

questionText: Você quer perguntar a um amigo se ele está ciente dos efeitos das mudanças climáticas no nível do mar. Como você faz isso?
correctAnswer: Are you aware of the effects of climate change on sea levels?
options: Are you aware of the effects of climate change on sea levels?
Do you know why sea levels are falling due to climate change?
Have you heard that rising sea levels are caused by deforestation only?
Did you know that climate change has no connection to ocean levels?

questionText: Você quer pedir a uma empresa que justifique por que ainda utiliza embalagens plásticas descartáveis. Como você faz essa solicitação de forma formal?
correctAnswer: Could you please explain why your company still uses disposable plastic packaging?
options: Could you please explain why your company still uses disposable plastic packaging?
I'd like to congratulate your company for its continued use of single-use plastics.
Would you mind telling me how your company plans to increase plastic usage?
Can you confirm that your company will never switch to sustainable packaging?

questionText: Você quer descrever as consequências do derramamento de petróleo no oceano para uma plateia internacional. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: Oil spills cause severe damage to marine ecosystems, killing sea life and polluting coastal areas.
options: Oil spills cause severe damage to marine ecosystems, killing sea life and polluting coastal areas.
Oil spills are beneficial to the ocean as they provide nutrients for marine animals.
When oil is released into the sea, it actually helps clean the water naturally.
Marine life tends to thrive in areas where oil spills have occurred.

questionText: Você quer fazer uma crítica construtiva a uma empresa dizendo que suas práticas de descarte de resíduos precisam melhorar. Como você expressa isso de forma profissional?
correctAnswer: I believe your waste disposal practices could be significantly improved to meet environmental standards.
options: I believe your waste disposal practices could be significantly improved to meet environmental standards.
Your company is doing an excellent job with waste management and needs no changes.
I think your environmental practices are perfect and should remain as they are.
Waste disposal is not important, and companies should not worry about it.

questionText: Você quer argumentar que as empresas têm tanta responsabilidade quanto os indivíduos na luta contra a poluição. Como você estrutura esse argumento?
correctAnswer: While individuals can make a difference, corporations bear equal, if not greater, responsibility for tackling pollution.
options: While individuals can make a difference, corporations bear equal, if not greater, responsibility for tackling pollution.
Only governments are responsible for pollution, and individuals have no role to play.
Corporations are not responsible for environmental issues since they create jobs.
Since individuals cause all the pollution, companies should not be held accountable.

questionText: Você precisa rebater o argumento de que o crescimento econômico é incompatível com a sustentabilidade ambiental. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: Economic growth and environmental sustainability are not mutually exclusive; in fact, green industries can drive both.
options: Economic growth and environmental sustainability are not mutually exclusive; in fact, green industries can drive both.
You're right that a country cannot grow economically while protecting the environment.
Sustainable development always slows down economic growth and should be avoided.
Environmental protection is too costly and hinders all forms of economic progress.

questionText: Você quer expressar ceticismo em relação às promessas de uma empresa que se declara sustentável, sem descartar completamente a possibilidade. Como você faz isso?
correctAnswer: I'm somewhat sceptical about their sustainability claims, though I'm open to being convinced by concrete evidence.
options: I'm somewhat sceptical about their sustainability claims, though I'm open to being convinced by concrete evidence.
I completely trust everything this company says about its environmental practices.
There's no reason to doubt any company that claims to be environmentally friendly.
I am fully convinced that all green labels are accurate and trustworthy.

questionText: Você precisa recomendar formalmente políticas específicas para reduzir as emissões de carbono em um relatório. Qual frase é mais adequada para fazer essa recomendação?
correctAnswer: It is strongly recommended that governments implement carbon pricing mechanisms to incentivise emission reductions.
options: It is strongly recommended that governments implement carbon pricing mechanisms to incentivise emission reductions.
Governments should probably think about maybe doing something about carbon at some point.
I suggest that we forget about carbon emissions since they are not that important.
Carbon pricing is too complicated and should never be considered as a policy option.

questionText: Em um debate, você quer reconhecer os pontos do oponente sobre o custo das energias renováveis, mas ainda defender sua superioridade a longo prazo. Como você faz isso?
correctAnswer: I acknowledge that renewable energy has high upfront costs; however, its long-term benefits far outweigh these initial investments.
options: I acknowledge that renewable energy has high upfront costs; however, its long-term benefits far outweigh these initial investments.
Renewable energy has no drawbacks whatsoever and is always cheaper than fossil fuels.
I completely disagree that renewable energy has any costs associated with it.
Since renewable energy is expensive, we should abandon it in favour of coal and oil.

questionText: Você está escrevendo um ensaio acadêmico e precisa apresentar evidências que apoiem a ideia de que a desflorestação contribui para as mudanças climáticas. Qual frase é mais adequada?
correctAnswer: Studies indicate that deforestation accounts for approximately 10% of global greenhouse gas emissions.
options: Studies indicate that deforestation accounts for approximately 10% of global greenhouse gas emissions.
Some people say that cutting down trees is good for the atmosphere.
Research proves that forests produce more carbon dioxide than they absorb.
There is no scientific consensus on whether deforestation affects the climate.

questionText: Você quer expressar que, embora medidas individuais sejam importantes, a mudança sistêmica é essencial para enfrentar a crise climática. Como você faz isso de forma sofisticada?
correctAnswer: Although individual actions are valuable, systemic change at governmental and corporate levels is indispensable in addressing the climate crisis.
options: Although individual actions are valuable, systemic change at governmental and corporate levels is indispensable in addressing the climate crisis.
Individual actions are the only solution to the climate crisis, and no other changes are needed.
Systemic change is unnecessary because small personal habits are enough to solve climate change.
Since governments do everything, individuals should not concern themselves with environmental issues.

questionText: Um jornalista te pergunta sobre o conceito de 'greenwashing'. Como você explica de forma precisa e crítica?
correctAnswer: Greenwashing refers to the practice of companies making misleading claims about their environmental credentials to attract eco-conscious consumers.
options: Greenwashing refers to the practice of companies making misleading claims about their environmental credentials to attract eco-conscious consumers.
Greenwashing is a method used by scientists to measure the carbon footprint of products.
Greenwashing describes the process of cleaning rivers and beaches using green technology.
Greenwashing means painting factories green to comply with environmental regulations.

questionText: Você quer propor uma solução inovadora para o problema dos resíduos eletrônicos em uma conferência internacional. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: I would like to propose the establishment of a global e-waste recycling framework that holds manufacturers accountable for the lifecycle of their products.
options: I would like to propose the establishment of a global e-waste recycling framework that holds manufacturers accountable for the lifecycle of their products.
I think we should encourage consumers to throw away their electronic devices more frequently.
My proposal is to stop using all electronic devices immediately to reduce e-waste.
I suggest that countries should ignore e-waste since it is too small an issue to address.

questionText: Você quer contextualizar historicamente o problema da poluição industrial para um público acadêmico. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: Industrial pollution has been a growing concern since the onset of the Industrial Revolution, when unchecked emissions began altering atmospheric composition.
options: Industrial pollution has been a growing concern since the onset of the Industrial Revolution, when unchecked emissions began altering atmospheric composition.
Industrial pollution is a recent phenomenon that only started in the 21st century.
Factories have always been environmentally friendly and do not contribute to pollution.
The Industrial Revolution led to cleaner air and better environmental conditions worldwide.

questionText: Você quer expressar nuance ao afirmar que a tecnologia pode ser tanto parte do problema quanto da solução ambiental. Como você diz isso?
correctAnswer: Technology is a double-edged sword in the environmental debate; while it drives consumption and pollution, it also enables renewable energy solutions.
options: Technology is a double-edged sword in the environmental debate; while it drives consumption and pollution, it also enables renewable energy solutions.
Technology is only harmful to the environment and has no positive applications in sustainability.
All technological advancements are beneficial to the environment without exception.
The relationship between technology and the environment is simple and straightforward.

questionText: Você precisa refutar de forma acadêmica o argumento de que países em desenvolvimento não deveriam ter que se preocupar com metas de emissão. O que você argumenta?
correctAnswer: While it is true that developed nations have historically emitted more, climate change affects all countries equally, making shared but differentiated responsibility essential.
options: While it is true that developed nations have historically emitted more, climate change affects all countries equally, making shared but differentiated responsibility essential.
Developing countries should be completely exempt from all environmental obligations.
Only wealthy nations are affected by climate change, so poorer countries can ignore it.
Emission targets are only relevant for industrialised countries and serve no purpose elsewhere.

questionText: Você quer alertar sobre os riscos de soluções tecnológicas de geoengenharia como forma de combater as mudanças climáticas. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: Although geoengineering offers potential solutions, deploying such technologies without thorough research could trigger unpredictable environmental consequences.
options: Although geoengineering offers potential solutions, deploying such technologies without thorough research could trigger unpredictable environmental consequences.
Geoengineering is a completely safe approach to climate change with no risks involved.
We should immediately implement all geoengineering solutions without any further study.
Geoengineering has no effect on climate change and is a waste of research funding.

questionText: Você quer apresentar dados sobre a aceleração do derretimento das calotas polares como evidência do aquecimento global. Como você introduz esses dados?
correctAnswer: Recent data suggests that polar ice caps are melting at an unprecedented rate, providing compelling evidence of accelerated global warming.
options: Recent data suggests that polar ice caps are melting at an unprecedented rate, providing compelling evidence of accelerated global warming.
New research confirms that polar ice caps have been growing steadily over the last decade.
Scientists have recently proven that climate change has no effect on polar regions.
The latest figures show that ice sheets are expanding, disproving global warming theories.

questionText: Você quer expressar que a proteção ambiental e a justiça social estão intrinsecamente ligadas. Como você articula essa relação?
correctAnswer: Environmental protection and social justice are deeply interconnected, as marginalised communities are disproportionately affected by ecological degradation.
options: Environmental protection and social justice are deeply interconnected, as marginalised communities are disproportionately affected by ecological degradation.
Environmental issues and social inequality are entirely separate concerns with no relation.
Wealthy communities suffer the most from environmental pollution and climate change.
Social justice has nothing to do with the environment and should not be discussed together.

questionText: Você quer pedir a um especialista que esclareça o conceito de neutralidade de carbono e como ela pode ser alcançada. Como você faz essa solicitação?
correctAnswer: Could you elaborate on what carbon neutrality means in practice and outline the steps required to achieve it?
options: Could you elaborate on what carbon neutrality means in practice and outline the steps required to achieve it?
Can you confirm that carbon neutrality is impossible to achieve under any circumstances?
Would you agree that carbon neutrality is just a marketing term with no real meaning?
Do you think carbon neutrality refers to countries that produce no goods whatsoever?
